item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 181930Z AUTO 21004KT CAVOK 13/09 Q1016 NOSIG
🟡 TAF LFOT 181700Z 1818/1918 25005KT 9999 SCT040 PROB30 TEMPO 1903/1906 4000 -RA BKN012 BECMG 1907/1909 19010KT TEMPO 1907/1914 BKN012 PROB40 TEMPO 1909/1912 4000 -RA TEMPO 1914/1918 22012G25KT -SHRA
